message:
Add superpowers-lab plugin to marketplace

Add experimental skills plugin for controlling interactive CLI tools
through tmux automation. Enables Claude Code to work with vim, menuconfig,
REPLs, git rebase -i, and other interactive terminal applications.

Version: 0.1.0
Plugin: https://github.com/obra/superpowers-lab

Bump marketplace version to 1.0.8

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
